gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands with a welcoming stance, pointing toward the screen while drawing attention to three groups of two colorful cubes.
a person leans slightly forward, tilting their head and raising an eyebrow while inviting guesses about the total number of cubes.
a tutor gestures with both hands as if arranging objects, stepping to the side while demonstrating how to make rows.
a person spreads their arms wide to show three rows, then taps their fingers to indicate each row has two cubes.
a tutor steps forward slightly, tilting their head to the side while asking how to find the total number of cubes.
a person turns toward the class, raising one hand and counting on fingers while encouraging everyone to count each row together.
a tutor leans forward softly, inviting the learners to think by shifting their head and asking how many cubes they have altogether.
a person claps their hands together energetically, smiling widely to celebrate the learners for mastering multiplication with groups of objects.
a tutor gestures with one hand towards imaginary groups while explaining that multiplication means adding equal groups together.
